lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Stop! Who ever passes this bridge must answer me these questions three.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ask me the questions, bridgemaster. I am not afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is '[player name] of Lumbridge'.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ummm... I thought I was going to die.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. So can I go by?

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: There's always someone who wants to be difficult, off with you!

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is '[player name] of Varrock'.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: What... is the capital of Kandarin?

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can a single kingdom have multiple kings?

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is '[player name] of Falador'.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: What... is the air-speed velocity of an unladen chompy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean? A Feldip chompy or one from Karamja?

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Huh? I-- I don't know that. ARGHHH!

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Internal self-doubt and the crippling feeling of everyone hating me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooookay then, perhaps I should go past.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay! I'll go do that. Bye.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: I'm sure I've seen them fly before, but it could've been falling gracefully.

lines.speaker: Ponts the Bridgemaster
lines.text: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.

lines.text: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 11 meters per second, or 24 miles an hour.
